title: Authorized rules
doc_html:
§457.  Authorized rules

The secretary of the Department of Public Safety and Corrections shall adopt rules not inconsistent with this Part in order to fully effectuate the purpose and intent hereof.

Acts 1992, No. 189, §1, eff. June 8, 1992.
